calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR 176. Telephone: 406-381-1645.

David M. Zeff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mr. Crave Bistro, LLC.
Simon Sin, Managing Member for plaintiff Mr. Crave Bistro, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
Chris Myron, Process Server for plaintiff Mr. Crave Bistro, LLC, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant Soul Groove, LLC, dba Mom's Soul Groove Restaurant.
Jason Fordley, owner of Soul Groove, LLC, dba Mom's Soul Groove Restaurant, was placed under oath and permited to provide some testimony as a courtesy by the Court.
The Court informed Mr. Fordley that in plaintiff's complaint, defendant Soul Groove was sued as an LLC. Accordingly, as he is not an attorney, he (Mr. Fordley) cannot appear at these proceedings on behalf of defendant Soul Groove, LLC.
Additionally, Soul Groove LLC, dba Mom's Soul Groove Restaurant, is presently as suspended LLC.

Plaintiff's complaint was filed on February 15, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on April 9, 2018.
DOE defendants were dimissed today, May 7, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mr. Crave Bistro, LLC, and against defendant Soul Groove LLC, dba Soul Groove Restaurant, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $2,500.00.
Holdover Damages - $2,833.56.
Attorney Fees - $12,940.00.
Costs - $329.50.
Liens Accrued by Defendant - $3,143.94.

Total: - $21,747.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Mr. Crave Bistro, LLC is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 655 Ellis Street, San Francisco, CA 94109, known as Mom's Soul Groove Restaurant.

The rental agreement is canceled and the lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Continued To May-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501
